White-Label Program

White-Label Phishing
Testing

Deliver phishing awareness programs and social engineering testing under your brand. Customized campaigns with your branding throughout.

White-Label Phishing Testing for Your Organization

Deliver phishing awareness programs and social engineering testing under your brand. Customized campaigns with your branding throughout.

Our white-label model is designed for IT providers, MSPs, and consulting firms that want to offer enterprise-grade phishing testing services without building the capability internally. We handle everything — from delivery to documentation — while your brand stays front and center.

How White-Label Works

  • Your branding on all client-facing deliverables and reports
  • Direct communication channels that appear to originate from your team
  • Customizable service delivery to match your existing processes
  • NDA-protected partnership — your clients never know we exist
  • Scalable capacity for growing client portfolios

What You Get

  • Fortune 50-caliber phishing testing expertise under your brand
  • No hiring, training, or infrastructure investment required
  • Predictable per-engagement or retainer-based pricing
  • Dedicated partner success manager
  • 24/7 escalation path for urgent client needs

Ideal White-Label Partners

MSPs looking to add phishing testing to their managed services portfolio. IT consultancies needing specialized cybersecurity capability. Value-Added Resellers expanding into security services. Regional IT firms competing against national competitors.

Start White-Labeling

Add Phishing Testing to your portfolio with zero overhead.

Get Started

White-Label Benefits

  • Your brand on everything
  • No hiring required
  • Scalable capacity
  • NDA-protected
  • Dedicated partner manager
